name: Baby Red Ant
description: A harmless pet that proves your friendship with the red ant colony. It is the permanent reward for taking the friendly route with its queen.
behavior: It behaves like a docile pet: it follows its owner, can be petted, dressed, and assigned to a pet house.
interactionWithPlayer: It bonds to the player automatically, can wear pet gear, and also provides a 20-slot mobile inventory.
interactionWithCreatures: It is passive and does not seek fights. Its main role is to accompany the player and provide utility outside direct combat.
strategy: Its main value is for building: while it follows you outside a pet house, it increases hauling strength and makes carrying planks and stems much easier.
respawnInfo: If it dies, it can be recovered by returning to the Red Ant Queen as long as that route is still valid for the current save or NG+ cycle.
specialTraits: It is obtained automatically by feeding the Red Ant Queen the correct yummy Mushroom Sandwich.
It grants +Hauling Strength while not stored in a pet house, letting the player carry 15 extra planks or stems.
Unlike regular worker ants, it does not steal food from roasting spits, jerky racks, or storage.
